# utilities — ios-talenta

| Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `date_service` | Centralized date handling with timezone and formatting support. |
| `helper_extensions` | Extension files live in `Talenta/Shared/Extension/` grouped by type. |
| `logger` | Centralized logging with severity levels. |
| `null_safety_extensions` | Always use extension methods for optional unwrapping — never force-unwrap or inline `?? value`. |
| `storage_service` | Abstract key-value storage for tokens, preferences, and cached data. |
